evidence_summary: Establish the emotional distance between Carter and Dejah Thoris through a rhythmic, long-distance march across the Martian plains. The visual tone must emphasize social tension and cultural barriers via character spacing and cold facial expressions.

Group in motion across open terrain; Carter observing Dejah from a distance.
Group continues march; tension settles into a heavy, resigned silence.
A continuous trek toward Thark characterized by internal reflection and external social friction.
